title: Odyssey | A Post Apocalyptique Adventure
description: A story-based adventure through a dark facility, with focus on immersive gameplay and good graphics.
body:
This mod is a work in progress much more will be added and polished in the future

 **Warning this mod is meant for computers high specs continue with caution!**

 **Warning this mod contains flashing lights and may cause discomfort and/or seasures for thoses with photosensitive epilepsy!**
## Developped by 

- [Kronoz](https://www.youtube.com/@KRONOZ__/videos)
- [DarkFox](https://www.youtube.com/@DarkFoxStudiosOF)

## Short description

Odyssey transforms Minecraft into a story based adventure through a new dimension and fully revamped enviornment. You will play as an outcast, building new weapons and unveiling secrets as you plunge deeper into the heart of an post apocalyptic facility.

As you search for your only friend Evelyn, you will pick up some strange companions... and perhaps discover more about yourself than you wished to know.

## THIS MOD ADDS

**BUILT-IN** and performance-friendly shaders,


**COLORED LIGHTING** using the Veil Engine,

**NEW GAMEPLAY MECHANICS** - Wall running, Body Modification, Heart Sacrifice,

**POWERFUL NEW WEAPONS** - Energy Spear with a Dash Ability, the "THRASHER" Mech SUIT and more!





You are prohibited to reupload this mod or claim it as your own!
